title: cyclosorus subfalcinellus
intro: Cyclosorus subfalcinellus, also known as the lance-leafed cyclosorus or subfalcinellus fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Cyclosorus subfalcinellus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or decoction, with the leaves being harvested and dried for use in herbal remedies.
